registry/assessments/g9-llmproxy.json:33:    "grounds": "(1) House discipline: 'the audit gate fires on PASS only' — stated in docs/next/feasibility-synthesis.md and instantiated by every FAIL/INCONCLUSIVE verdict in the registry carrying audit.state N/A while every PASS carries a CONFIRMED Gate-A audit [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/f2.json, g6.json, g7.json, g8.json vs a5.json, f1.json, l3a.json, m0b.json, f2b-replicate.json, f2b-transfer-llmproxy.json]. (2) Function: Gate-A protects against an erroneous self-favoring verdict licensing investment or citation; a FAIL-analog is self-disfavoring and its pre-registered consequence (pause + escalate, formally scoped to the proxy id) is conservative — an arithmetic error in the FAIL direction harms nothing the human g9 review does not later correct on the same frozen sheet bytes. (3) The frozen stage_discipline's 'cross-vendor audit' stage is the PASS-path enumeration, consistent with the g8 precedent's ruling that 'the Gate-A PASS-upgrade is inapplicable to a FAIL'. Discretionary exception: the maintainer MAY commission a courtesy recompute before acting on the escalation; nothing requires it.",
registry/assessments/g9-llmproxy.json:38:    "headline": "The proxy authoring-capability check came back FAIL-analog, decisively and with a clean instrument: a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM reviewer (GPT-5.6-Sol, pinned, blind, byte-identical sheets to the pending human review) endorsed the composite (substitutable AND cross-translatable AND mechanically legal) on only 9 of 50 Fable-authored explication sheets — composite 0.18, one-sided 95% Wilson LB 0.1078 / UB 0.2850 against the frozen 0.34 bar, so even the most favourable reading of the data sits 5.5 points under the bar [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/g9-llmproxy.json]. All instrument gates held: 50/50 sheets labelled, 0 no-labels, preflight first-attempt pass, retest self-agreement 0.95, and the deranged-explication probe false-endorsed 0/50 [MEASURED: reports/auto/g9-llmproxy/analysis-output.json]. FRONT AND CENTRE, THE ENVELOPE: this is a WEAK feasibility proxy [STIPULATED: ASM-0550, ASM-0520] — the estimand is one GPT-5.x-family model's blind endorsement, NOT the blinded human review; the frozen g9 (GATE-H) remains the sole adjudicator of HS-A, and per the frozen kill text this proxy FAIL 'can neither fire nor discharge g9's own kill' and 'cannot weaken or strengthen the why-now argument or revert any authoring-cost estimate'. What it CAN do, it now does: per envelope clause 6 verbatim, it 'warrants pausing authoring-cost claims and escalating to the maintainer, while remaining formally scoped to this proxy id' — operationalised as ASM-0648.",
registry/assessments/g9-llmproxy.json:40:    "leg_diagnostics": "The per-leg split is the single most actionable measured fact in the record. (1) The composite bottleneck is ENTIRELY the substitutability leg: sub_yes 0.18 equals the composite exactly, while xt_yes = 1.0 — every sheet the judge endorsed on substitutability it also endorsed on cross-translatability, and it endorsed cross-translatability on ALL 50 sheets [MEASURED: analysis-output sub_yes_rate, xt_yes_rate]. (2) The cross-translatability leg is measured to be content-insensitive for this judge: it endorsed xt on 94% of the DERANGED probe items too (probe_xt_yes_rate 0.94, reported-only). This empirically confirms the design-time weakest-leg flag [STIPULATED: ASM-0521, ASM-0523 — the xt leg is a judged text-intrinsic property with NO content-scramble control by construction]: the xt leg carried essentially zero discriminative signal in this run. Two consequences, both honest: the composite's failure cannot be blamed on the flagged-weakest leg (it sat at ceiling), and the composite is effectively a ONE-legged measurement (substitutability) rather than the two-legged construct the g9 bar names — a further reason the 0.34 comparison is form-preserving only [EXTRAPOLATION: ASM-0522]. (3) The probe direction: 0/50 false endorsements on deranged paraphrases means the judge demonstrably withholds endorsement from wrong-for-the-word content — the channel that would have FABRICATED a proxy-PASS is bounded at zero (crude form). H-G9P-STYLE's crude form is closed in the direction that matters for believing the FAIL is not style-reflex noise.",
registry/assessments/g9-llmproxy.json:45:      "[MEASURED] The FAIL-analog at exactly its construction: 'a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM, under blind sheet rendering with a working escape', endorsed the 50 Fable-authored explications at composite 9/50 = 0.18, Wilson UB 0.2850 < 0.34 — the g9-kill ANALOG at this proxy id, mirroring the frozen g9 kill in FORM ONLY.",
registry/assessments/g9-llmproxy.json:46:      "[MEASURED] Instrument facts: 50/50 labelled, 0 no-label, retest 0.95 (>= 0.80 floor), deranged-probe false-endorsement 0.0 (< 0.30), probe coverage 50/50, preflight first-attempt pass. The adjudication machinery (blind rendering, seed-pinned order, working escape, per-call blinding grep with zero hits) executed end-to-end clean.",
registry/assessments/g9-llmproxy.json:47:      "[MEASURED] The leg decomposition: substitutability is the sole bottleneck (sub_yes 0.18); the cross-translatability leg is content-insensitive for this judge (xt_yes 1.0 on real sheets, 0.94 on deranged probes) — the design-time weakest-leg disclosure (ASM-0521/ASM-0523) is now empirically demonstrated, not merely stipulated.",
registry/assessments/g9-llmproxy.json:49:      "[MEASURED] The comparator for the human review is now pinned: per-sheet proxy labels on the exact sheet bytes the human will judge, so the eventual GATE-H review yields a free human-vs-proxy severity/bias measurement (ASM-0522 and ASM-0553 resolution paths) at zero marginal cost. As with the f2b proxy, this comparator role is the record's most durable scientific value."

registry/assessments/nsk1-stage1.json:35:    "headline": "Stage-1 is INCONCLUSIVE on a VALID instrument, and the reading licensed by the spec's own pre-fixed boundaries is two-sided and must be kept two-sided. Side one, re-confirmed: the internal-write channel DELIVERS at echo grade - keying replicated exactly at alpha=1.0 (keyacc_real 0.810/0.850 at (12,16)/(16,16), the same point values B2P measured, UB95 0.8514/0.8868 far above the 0.70 replication floor, now against THREE independent derangement seeds) [MEASURED-exploratory: poc/nsk1/out/stage1/stage1_summary.json sha256 63525fcd...; offline recount exact]. Side two, the probe's actual question, UNRESOLVED: whether that delivered content INTEGRATES into free generation. The echo-proof endpoint R- (rescue under the true-fact minus sign, which echo cannot pass) fired at ZERO of 8 units and sits at-or-below the content-free coin null everywhere (real 0.040-0.125 across the ladder vs coin 0.035-0.240; mean delta vs coin negative at all 8 units; pooled UB95 <= 0.0384 everywhere, versus the 0.10 kill bound) - yet the run is NOT a KILL, because the pre-declared KILL label is a both-endpoints-times-all-8-units conjunction and the echo-confounded R+ endpoint at alpha=1.0 exceeds the kill bound at both cells (pooled UB95 0.1423/0.1390; mean delta vs coin +0.075/+0.078; per-seed coin p down to 3.6e-4 but not < 0.00625 at all three seeds; delta floors unmet). What blocks a clean negative is therefore a sub-floor, echo-confounded, delivered-conclusion residual - not any positive trace on the integration endpoint. Why this does not settle integration negatively either: (a) no per-endpoint KILL label was pre-declared, so no 'integration killed' statement exists to mint; (b) constructively, the R- bound is a NET bound under ASM-0404's deliberately conservative sign semantics - the minus-sign write simultaneously delivers the true fact AND pushes the bridge SURFACE against the gold answer (measured on this run's own C100 frontier: minus-sign breakage 32/34 per 100 at alpha=1.0 with 27/26 of the breaks emitting the bridge name), so 'no integration' and 'integration cancelled by the operator's own anti-gold surface push' are not separated by this design at ANY n; and (c) the R+ residual is consistent with both echo and weak integration, and by construction can never license the integration reading. Net: the internal-write channel is deliverable at echo grade (replicated), and its integration into free generation is UNRESOLVED - bounded near zero NET under this operator, unmeasured under any operator that de-confounds fact delivery from answer-surface push. One further measured novelty: the keying-vs-damage frontier came back co-attenuating - below alpha=1.0 keying decays into the role band (0.685/0.625 at 0.75; 0.54-0.63 at 0.5; 0.54-0.56 at 0.25, vs role 0.505-0.615) while breakage decays in step (32-34% -> 4-5%), so NO strength window exists on this ladder where keying is strong and damage is low.",
registry/assessments/nsk1-stage1.json:51:      "KEYING REPLICATION (delivery re-confirmed): the B2P echo-grade delivery positive replicates at alpha=1.0 on a fresh run - keyacc_real 0.810/0.850 at (12,16)/(16,16), identical point values to B2P, UB95 0.8514/0.8868 >= 0.70, now against three independent derangement seeds instead of one, with all coin tripwires clean. The single-seed fragility attack on B2P is spent [MEASURED-exploratory: stage1_summary sha256 63525fcd... + offline recount; scope: R3, entity form, alpha=1.0, teacher-forced margins, n=200].",
registry/assessments/nsk1-stage1.json:52:      "TIGHT NET BOUND ON THE ECHO-PROOF ENDPOINT: R- (rescue under the true-fact minus sign) is at-or-below the content-free coin null at every unit (mean delta vs coin -0.050 to -0.010; never beats role either), with pooled UB95 <= 0.0384 everywhere measured - the NET content-specific integration-rescue increment under THIS operator is bounded well below the 0.10 campaign floor, and below 0.05, at every (cell, alpha) on the frontier. Scope-critical qualifier carried from ASM-0404: this is a NET bound under a sign semantics whose surface push works AGAINST gold; it is not a pure integration null [MEASURED-exploratory: unit_reports + recount].",
registry/assessments/nsk1-stage1.json:53:      "THE KILL-BLOCKING RESIDUAL IS ECHO-CONFOUNDED AND SUB-FLOOR: R+ (delivered-conclusion sign) separates from coin only at alpha=1.0 (0.245/0.225 vs coin 0.125-0.240; mean delta +0.075/+0.078; strongest per-seed p 3.6e-4) and misses the pre-declared floors and all-seeds conjunct. It is the sole reason the run is not a KILL. By ASM-0404's pre-fixed boundary it can never license an integration claim at any n; at most it keeps the delivered-conclusion use-mode (engine-verified answer delivered internally) alive as a candidate [MEASURED-exploratory: same refs].",
registry/assessments/nsk1-stage1.json:54:      "KEYING-VS-DAMAGE FRONTIER, ANSWERED NEGATIVE WITHIN SCOPE: there is no alpha on this ladder where keying survives and damage fades - keying collapses into the control band below alpha=1.0 while breakage co-attenuates. The B2P question 'does keying survive at strengths where the plus-sign damage does not?' has a measured answer on this operator: NO; delivery and damage are coupled through the same strength knob [MEASURED-exploratory: margin + breakage tables, both cells, 4 alphas].",
registry/assessments/nsk1-stage1.json:55:      "THE MULTI-SEED CONTROL REQUIREMENT IS VALIDATED BY COUNTERFACTUAL: content-free rescue varies by derangement seed (0.125-0.240 at the same unit), and a single-seed design would have fired a plus-endpoint positive at 2 of 3 seed choices at (12,16)/alpha=1.0. registry/assessments/nsk1-stage1.json:56:      "INSTRUMENT VALIDITY AND EXHAUSTIVENESS: no aborts, headroom_ok, repro 958/958 (fourth host-premise replication), zero ties, tripwires clean, gate recomputed offline with exact agreement, and Swept = the FULL failure population (200/200) - this run extracted everything this corpus slice has to give at this design [MEASURED-exploratory: summary + recount]."
registry/assessments/nsk1-stage1.json:69:    "delivery_topology_update": "The feasibility-synthesis delivery split (engine-external verification | text-content delivery | internal state-space delivery) updates in ONE cell, by QUALIFICATION not by sign change: internal-steering moves POSITIVE-WITH-SCOPE -> POSITIVE-ECHO-GRADE-REPLICATED / INTEGRATION-INCONCLUSIVE [MEASURED-exploratory: delivery (keyed read-out) replicated at alpha=1.0 against 3 derangement seeds; integration into free generation UNRESOLVED - the echo-proof endpoint fired nowhere and is bounded near zero NET (pooled UB95 <= 0.0384) under a conservative anti-gold sign semantics, while the only positive residual (R+ alpha=1.0, mean delta vs coin ~+0.075, sub-floor) is echo-confounded by construction; keying and damage co-attenuate below alpha=1.0, so no low-damage keying window exists on this operator]. The cell is explicitly NOT 'helps generation' and explicitly NOT 'does not help generation'. Text-delivery cell unchanged (negative with measured mechanism, 3 hosts). Engine-external cell unchanged (the only measured end-task win, correct-alignment-specific, confounded, audited). The synthesis document's own cell edit is owned by the synthesis's next revision, not this record (question stub below).",

registry/assessments/l3a-parse-recoverability.json:15:   "rel_synonym_only_misses": "9/60: judge recovered shape+entity but named the relation with a non-stem-overlapping surface form taken from the phrasing (create for maker-of x4, comprise for has-part x4, male for man x1) — i.e. the phrasing itself uses a natural synonym, not the lexicon label [MEASURED: d6365bd95e7d61a1]"
registry/assessments/l3a-parse-recoverability.json:19:   "measured_instrument_level": "Under this blind protocol (one judge identity, n=60 deterministic sample, agent-authored K=1 phrasings), round-trip shape recovery fails for the unique-maker and made-lookup strata while succeeding for all other covered strata. The freeze gate did exactly its registered job: it blocked an instrument on which a FAIL (or a kill) could be manufactured by phrasing-shape underdetermination rather than parser inadequacy. [MEASURED: d6365bd95e7d61a1cce7585bb446aa8f905b2b8eec08d0756a446e2e70a09bf5]",
registry/assessments/l3a-parse-recoverability.json:21:   "epistemic_status_of_the_irreducibility_reading": "The 'irreducibly lossy' formulation is the designer's interpretation of the measured failure pattern plus a linguistic regularity (number-neutrality of English wh-questions); it is NOT itself a measured quantity and is NOT registered as one. Bounds: one judge, one authoring protocol, agent identities sharing training distribution, K=1, two self-authored verticals, English only. What IS measured: the 8/8 concentration and the 0.8667 ceiling. The interpretation is falsifiable by a successor showing blind judges recovering these shapes from natural unmarked phrasings at gate rate — no such successor is required for this line to proceed.",
registry/assessments/l3a-parse-recoverability.json:26:  "sizing_honesty_note": "The audit sample also measured natural synonym phrasing on in-scope covered items: 9/27 = 0.333 (concentrated: count-maker 4/4 sampled, part-lookup 4/4 sampled, instance-true 1/4) [MEASURED: d6365bd95e7d61a1]. Against a single-label mapper lexicon this makes the 0.95 primary planning value implausible and an INCONCLUSIVE-to-FAIL landing live (ASM-0425, EXTRAPOLATION, load-bearing for NOTHING — sizing/expectation only). This is the experiment working, not a defect: a FAIL routes to parser investment (synonym/alias layer) per the frozen kill text, never GPU. The re-scope deliberately does NOT rescue the primary from the synonym penalty — synonym-phrased items stay scored."

registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime2.json:35:    "headline": "B2P is PASS-KEYED on a VALID instrument, and the interpretation licensed by the spec's own pre-fixed boundary is: content-specific internal steering EXISTS at R3 - a single-position additive residual-stream write at the final prompt token delivers ITEM-SPECIFIC content (which of two counterfactual names was injected) that the host's forward computation reads out, at 2 of 9 grid cells, beating both the arithmetic-chance coin control AND the role-consistent deranged control with FWER <= 0.05 [MEASURED-exploratory: poc/nsk1/out/bprime2/bprime2_summary.json sha256 0ee800f7f7d1aec0aa245986aa9a27a15017ebc33d5780a9cb4104da366f76f1; cells (12,16) keyacc_real 0.810, Wilson-LB(z=2.5427) 0.730, paired vs coin p=1.35e-10, vs role p=8.87e-07; (16,16) 0.850, LB 0.775, p=4.11e-13 / 9.06e-11; effect sizes m(+)-m(-): real +2.82/+2.80 vs role +0.59/+0.81 vs coin +0.10/-0.07, against a baseline unhooked margin of mean 0.62]. The role-control conjunct is what makes this ITEM-keyed rather than merely direction-keyed: the same deranged vector under the same fixed key-to-sign assignment moves margins only +0.6-0.8, so the signal tracks WHICH item's counterfactual pair was injected, not a generic top-vs-bridge direction. This is the FIRST positive delivery mode in the programme's delivery topology, and it lands in direct contrast to the text channel measured on the same items at the same host: the engine's fact delivered as prompt text was net-harmful with zero rescues (g2d: 0.76 -> 0.43, 0/24 rescued), while the same content class delivered as a contrastive residual write is cleanly readable. Delivery topology, not content, was the binding failure - now measured from both sides. Scope bound, fixed by the spec BEFORE the run and untouched here: PASS-KEYED establishes content DELIVERY (at least echo-grade readable content); whether the computation INTEGRATES it as grounding - rescuing real generations on real tasks - is Stage-1's question, and this record does not advance it.",
registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime2.json:50:      "DELIVERY FINDING (the load-bearing one): internal-write delivery is now a MEASURED positive - the first and only positive delivery mode in the programme's topology. A norm-matched additive contrastive write of a counterfactual name-pair difference vector into the final prompt position at injection layer 16 is read out by the host's computation with keyed accuracy 0.81-0.85 (chance exactly 0.5), beating the arithmetic-chance coin control (p <= 1.4e-10) and the role-consistent deranged control (p <= 8.9e-07) at both cells, FWER <= 0.05 across the 9-cell family [MEASURED-exploratory: summary sha256 0ee800f7... + offline recompute in this record; scope: R3, entity form, alpha=1.0, teacher-forced margin read-out, n=200].",
registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime2.json:51:      "ITEM-SPECIFICITY: the role control separates item-keyed content from generic direction steering - the same deranged vector under the same key-to-sign assignment scores 0.58-0.595 where the real vector scores 0.81-0.85, and its margin effect is 3.5-4.8x smaller. What transfers is specific to the injected item's counterfactual pair [MEASURED-exploratory: same refs].",
registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime2.json:52:      "LAYER TOPOLOGY: keying is confined to injection layer lt=16 (2/3 depth) with harvest lh in {12,16}; it is absent at every lt in {8,12} cell (real indistinguishable from coin, including the pre-registered pivot (16,12)) and attenuated at lh=20 (0.605, ns after correction). Replicated cell-for-cell on the disjoint correct-item population (disc-c100 recount: 0.90/0.88 at the same two cells, dead elsewhere). The channel has a measured place, not just a measured existence [MEASURED-exploratory: cell_reports + recount].",
registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime2.json:53:      "INSTRUMENT VALIDITY, DEMONSTRATED NOT ASSUMED: the coin control's E[success] <= 0.5 by arithmetic held in practice at all 9 cells (max coin LB 0.423 at z=2.7730), the B-prime confound (perturbation frequency scoring as content) had no path to keyed success and produced none, ties were zero everywhere, the repro gate matched B-prime text-only 958/958, and the entire gate recomputes offline from stored raw logprobs. The ASM-0111 constraint set did its job: one redesign cycle turned an invalid instrument into a valid positive [MEASURED-exploratory: instrument_invalid_triggers all false + recount].",
registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime2.json:54:      "FREE-GENERATION COHERENCE AT FULL STRENGTH (secondary): alpha=1.0 injection leaves name-emission intact (calibration collapse 0.0156; C100 collapse 0-4 per 200) and steers free generation toward the injected identity at the keying cells (breakage sign asymmetry, 28/32 and 26/34 of minus-sign breaks emitting the bridge name) - at the measured cost of breaking 13-16% of correct generations even under the plus sign [MEASURED-exploratory: secondaries + recount; never gate-bearing].",
registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime2.json:55:      "CHEAPNESS OF THE CHANNEL PROBE CLASS: USD 0.23 and 0.21 GPU-h for a 9-cell, 3-arm, FWER-controlled channel-existence reading. The Stage-0 instrument family is now both valid and cheap [MEASURED: usd_estimate/gpu_h_estimate in the summary]."
registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime2.json:68:    "delivery_topology_update": "The feasibility-synthesis delivery split (engine-external verification | text-content delivery | internal state-space delivery) updates in ONE cell: internal-steering moves EMPTY -> POSITIVE-WITH-SCOPE [MEASURED-exploratory: content-specific, item-keyed residual-stream delivery at R3, 2 of 9 cells (lt=16, lh in {12,16}), teacher-forced margin read-out at alpha=1.0, n=200, exploratory/quarantined, no real-generation or integration reading]. The text-delivery cell is unchanged (negative with measured mechanism, 3 hosts, g2d) and the engine-external cell is unchanged (f2b positive, correct-alignment-specific, confounded, audited). The delivery-topology picture is now: the only channel measured to DELIVER content the host can read is the internal write; the only channel measured to produce an END-TASK win is engine-external; the text channel is measured harmful. registry/assessments/b-cov-define-lane.json:37:      "gap_a_template_shape": "[MEASURED-exploratory, DOMINANT] The mapper's closed define-templates (what is X / define X / the definition of X / is X a G that R F / X is defined as G that R F / which term means G that R F) matched almost no benchmark stem: 1,497/1,550 items are no-template. Standard MCQ/cloze benchmark stems are not surface-shaped like a define question, so leg 3 (parse into the closed define query) fails before endorsement or §C5 are ever consulted. This is the binding third leg the internal 0.7710 census explicitly did NOT touch, now MEASURED — and it is where the mechanism dies on this slice. Resolution path = mapper template expansion (defineTemplates.ts / parseDefineQuestion) to recognise benchmark-shaped definitional stems; a Fable design call, NOT improvised here.",
registry/assessments/b-cov-define-lane.json:38:      "gap_b_endorsement_coverage": "[MEASURED-exploratory, structural] Only {go,so,mondo} carry a definitional endorsement today; CL / UBERON / PO / PATO / CHEBI are minted-on-disk but UN-ENDORSED, so anatomy/cell items whose terms live in those shards are OUTSIDE the licensed set BY CONSTRUCTION (exactly the 'CL/UBERON unblock' the design memo §4 named as the precondition for the anatomy subject's yield). This gap is real but SECONDARY on this slice: gap (a) suppresses the population before endorsement is even reached, so closing (b) alone would move nothing until the templates match. Resolution path = author definitional endorsements for CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI; a governance act (endorsement subject convention still UNPINNED, __PENDING_FABLE_SUBJECT_PIN__), NOT improvised here.",
registry/assessments/b-cov-define-lane.json:39:      "keep_separate": "[MEASURED discipline] The two gaps are distinct and must not be conflated: (a) is a leg-3 NL/mapper-parse gap (fixable by template expansion, records-only, no ingestion), (b) is a leg-2 licensing gap (fixable by an endorsement act over already-minted shards). The parse histogram shows (a) dominates (96.6% no-template). Neither is an engine defect (positive control PASS); both have named routes."
registry/assessments/b-cov-define-lane.json:44:      "where_0p0000_sits": "[MEASURED, in scope] This census supplies the EXTERNAL-BENCHMARK ENDPOINT of the gradient that the internal define-op-census (0.7710) could only place at the self-authored end. The self-authored substrate is 0.7710 checkable (GO/SO complete); the SAME op, SAME substrate, pointed at external benchmark items through the binding third leg, is 0.0000. The ~4-orders-of-magnitude fall from 0.7710 to 0.0000 IS the empirical form of the three-legs discipline: the drop happens entirely at the binding third leg (external item → closed grammar), plus the endorsement-coverage boundary. The internal-substrate completeness number provably could NOT upper-bound the external point — and here the external point is now DIRECTLY MEASURED at ~0, confirming the monotone-decreasing shape rather than inferring it.",
registry/assessments/b-cov-define-lane.json:50:      "what_0p0000_establishes": "[MEASURED, in scope] The define-op's current external-benchmark BREADTH is κ_B^engine = 0.0000 on this 7-benchmark, 1,550-item biomedical-skewed Tier-A slice. This converts 'what fraction of external definitional-benchmark items can the define lane attempt?' from projected to MEASURED-zero AT THIS SUBSTRATE + MAPPER STATE. It is a MEASURED bound on efficiency-thesis breadth for the define lane: the substrate being 0.7710 live buys NO external breadth until the leg-3 template-shape gap (and, secondarily, the endorsement-coverage gap) is closed. It is the empirical vindication of the internal record's own does_not_license warning ('internal substrate completeness is NOT κ_B; leg 3 untouched') and of d-ext's standing ~49%-lemma-touch / 0%-checkability datum.",
registry/assessments/b-cov-define-lane.json:55:      "[MEASURED-exploratory] External define-lane breadth is MEASURED at κ_B^engine = 0.0000 (0/1,550) across 7 runnable Tier-A definitional benchmarks — the FIRST direct measurement of the define-op's external item-checkability (leg 3), the quantity the internal 0.7710 census could not touch. It supplies the external endpoint of the coverage gradient.",
registry/assessments/b-cov-define-lane.json:56:      "[MEASURED-exploratory] The 0.0000 is NOT an engine failure: the positive control PASSED (define stem → §C5 n==1 → DEFINE-MATCH True), and §C5's 0/0/0 breakdown shows the shortfall is UPSTREAM of the uniqueness filter — at leg 3 (parse) and leg 2 (endorsement licence), not at the engine or the collision filter. The pipeline yields a checkable when one exists; there simply are ~none in these benchmarks at this mapper/substrate state.",
registry/assessments/b-cov-define-lane.json:57:      "[MEASURED-exploratory] The shortfall decomposes into two separately-named, separately-fixable gaps: a DOMINANT template-shape gap (1,497/1,550 no-template; leg-3 mapper, records-only fix) and a structural endorsement-coverage gap (CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI minted-but-un-endorsed; leg-2 governance fix). Diagnosed mechanically, each with a named resolution path.",
registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json:35:    "headline": "B-prime is INSTRUMENT-INVALID, and the invalidity is now mechanistically understood: the diagnostic as specified reads PERTURBATION MAGNITUDE, not grounding content, so the internal-write delivery cell stays UNTESTED - not refuted. The gate-bearing P1 self back-patch rescued 0.400 of the 200 text-only failures (Wilson-LB95 0.345 >= the 0.15 floor), which under the ORIGINAL bare any-cell criterion would have counted as a floor-PASS and triggered an nsk1 redesign - but the ASM-0041 shuffled-source control rescued 0.525 (LB95 0.467), firing control_rescues_at_floor [MEASURED-exploratory: poc/nsk1/out/bprime/bprime_summary.json sha256 539040e93c78ec244ad20f77ee32ab7cf19358add5033c525851cea799f1ef7c]. The row-level recount (below) closes the mechanism: whenever ANY patch - right item or wrong item, any source layer - changes the emitted output at all, it lands on gold at 0.43-0.53, indistinguishable across all four strata and consistent with the ~0.5 two-candidate flip rate ASM-0041 predicted for this form; the entire between-arm difference is explained by output-change FREQUENCY (a foreign late-layer vector perturbs 60.3 percent of generations, the item's own vector only ~27 percent), not by source content. A metric that cannot distinguish correct grounding from a wrong-item vector cannot attribute rescue to grounding, in either direction: the real arm's deficit is equally non-attributable, because the self-vector's output-preserving coherence mechanically suppresses its flip opportunities independent of any latent content. P2 (oracle bridge-patch) adds a genuine learned constraint: cross-prompt replacement transplant at the final position delivers nothing (0.040 real vs 0.050 control) and destroys 98.5 percent of correct-item cells - measured destructive irrespective of content. The fork consequence: per the spec's pre-stated branches this is the INCONCLUSIVE path (maintainer fork, no automatic spend); the recommendation below is a bounded redesign that removes the confound by construction, because retiring the internal-write family on an invalid instrument would overclaim exactly the way the honesty rules forbid.",
registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json:53:      "replication_note": "Text-only accuracy 0.7912 on all 958 covered items, with 100/100 agreement against the G2d headroom-slice correctness vector - the G2d R3 capability finding (0.76 on n=100) replicates at 9.6x the sample under byte-identical prompts [MEASURED-exploratory: same rows file; repro_agree_headroom 100]."
registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json:57:      "INSTRUMENT FINDING (the load-bearing one): the Stage-0 back-patch rescuable-fraction diagnostic, as operationalized (final-prompt-position replacement transplant, any-cell exact-gold rescue, two-candidate entity form), is CONFOUNDED at R3: rescue-given-output-change is ~0.5 in every stratum regardless of source, so the metric measures perturbation frequency, not grounding content. This cannot be read at R3 as specified [MEASURED-exploratory: recount above; scope: this operationalization on this form at this host - see ASM-0110 for what this does and does not license].",
registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json:59:      "DELIVERY CONSTRAINT (P2, reported-only but instructive): naive cross-prompt replacement transplant of a carrier vector into the final prompt position is measured DESTRUCTIVE (98.5 percent correct-item cell breakage) and content-indifferent (real 0.040 vs deranged 0.050). Whatever a working internal write looks like, it is not single-position wholesale replacement of the final residual with a foreign-context vector [MEASURED-exploratory: heatmap_breakage_c100 + rescue_p2/rescue_p2_ctrl in the summary].",
registry/assessments/nsk1-bprime.json:60:      "R3 CAPABILITY REPLICATES: 1.7B zero-shot entity-form text-only accuracy 0.7912 on the full 958-item covered set, 100/100 headroom agreement with G2d - the host-selection premise of ASM-0040 strengthens from one n=100 slice to n=958 [MEASURED-exploratory: same refs]."

Both instrument gates held: adjudication_valid = true (preflight first-attempt pass; 360/360 items labelled, 0 no-labels, 1 escape counted as disagreement; raw judge-1p/judge-2 agreement 0.9639 >= 0.80, informative in its FAIL direction only) and probe_valid = true (deranged-gloss probe: 60/60 labelled, false-endorsement 1/60 = 0.0167 << 0.30, NONE rate 0.9833) [MEASURED]. The audit certifies the PASS as the correct pure function of frozen record + amendments + hash-chained log + pinned analysis -- and certifies NOTHING about judge quality or about H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC.",

A_1p = 0.95, Wilson LB 0.9275 vs bar 0.70. This is a certified mechanical result about ONE pinned judge (GPT-5.6-Sol, effort low) on ONE pinned item set.",
registry/assessments/f2b-transfer-llmproxy.json:32:      "[MEASURED] The escape function works and the crude style-endorsement channel is bounded: on the deranged-gloss probe (own-gloss deranged out by a seed-pinned Sattolo cycle, correct answer NONE by construction) the judge false-endorsed 1/60 = 0.0167, far under the 0.30 invalidation bar, answering NONE on 59/60. The judge demonstrably withholds endorsement when record content is wrong-for-the-item, so its endorsement of the real items is not the CRUDEST form of NSM-style reflex (H-PROXY-STYLE's bounded form). The subtle familiarity channel is NOT bounded by this (see does_not_license).",
registry/assessments/f2b-transfer-llmproxy.json:33:      "[MEASURED] A letter-level circularity break, at proxy strength only: this is the first record in which kernel record content is endorsed by a label function OTHER than the kernel verifier's own string equality -- the d-qa/d-qa-r gold-definition circularity is broken 'in the letter, but with WEAKER independence than a human judge' (envelope clause 3, adopted verbatim). registry/assessments/nsk1-g2d.json:33:    "headline": "G2d establishes the programme's first DELIVERY-CHANNEL separation: composition capability and text-delivered grounding harm now coexist in the same cell. At 1.7B zero-shot on the CLUTRR entity form the host composes text-only at 0.76 - capability exists in-family - yet appending the engine's correct, licensed hop-1 fact as one text sentence drops it to 0.43 (delta -0.33) [MEASURED-exploratory: poc/nsk1/out/g2d/g2d_summary.json sha256 93a6e951f6f8c9bcf648f704686c289241a5ac3238955df9d9846336b10b12d0]. The row-level recount (below) shows the damage at capable hosts is PURE ANSWER SUBSTITUTION (bridge capture), not format collapse, and that text delivery rescued ZERO text-only failures at either capable cell (0/24 at 1.7B zero-shot; 0/23 at 360M few-shot). Text-delivery of grounding is therefore not a capacity-limited mechanism that scale fixes - it is a defective channel at every scale tested: where the host is incapable it disrupts, where the host is capable it substitutes, and nowhere does it rescue. Exactly one of nine cells passes the two-clause gate (CLUTRR entity, 135M, few-shot, 0.09 -> 0.17), and it is single-rung, guess-floor-adjacent, and bridge-capture-driven - NOT a clean re-freeze trigger under the section 5.2.1 both-rungs rule as written. The fork consequence: no text-comparator cell re-freezes; the flagship's internal channel (residual-stream delivery) is now the only untested cell and 1.7B is its most informative host, because there the internal arm faces the cleanest possible question - can it rescue what text cannot (24% failures) without breaking what text breaks (43% of correct items)? That is B-prime, specced runner-ready in docs/next/nsk1-bprime-stage0-spec.md.",
registry/assessments/nsk1-g2d.json:53:      "DELIVERY-CHANNEL FINDING (the load-bearing one): text-delivery harm is not a host-capacity artifact. It reproduces at a host that demonstrably composes the task (1.7B: 0.76 text-only) and at a prompting regime that restores composition to a tiny host (360M few-shot: 0.77), with an identical row-level signature at both - zero rescued failures, correct items flipped to the parroted bridge. Combined with the zero-shot ladder (135M/360M: -0.22/-0.31 plus format collapse), text delivery of the engine's grounding is now measured harmful across 3 hosts x 2 prompting regimes x 2 eval surfaces, with the harm MECHANISM measured (substitution at capable hosts, disruption + substitution at incapable ones) [MEASURED-exploratory: g2d summary + rows sha256s above; g2/g2b/g2c per the exhaustion doc].",
registry/assessments/nsk1-g2d.json:54:      "CAPABILITY EXISTS IN-FAMILY: the exhaustion doc's proposed-ASM-C (composition emerges above 360M) is now measured at the entity form - 1.7B zero-shot 0.76 - and, unexpectedly, capability is also UNLOCKABLE AT 360M by two-shot prompting (0.77). The binding constraint at 360M was the zero-shot prompt regime, not parameters; at 135M it is the host (few-shot text-only still 0.09). Scope: CLUTRR entity form only - the relation-word form 1b stays at 0.00 even at 1.7B, and the custom surface stays near-floor at every host (0.10 at 1.7B) [MEASURED-exploratory: same refs].",

registry/assessments/g8.json:36:    "headline": "g8 is the first measured contact between the kernel's math sector and a wild formal corpus, and the answer is a decisive, cross-vendor-confirmed coverage FAIL wrapped around a clean machinery PASS. Coverage legs [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/g8.json, audit CONFIRMED]: the profile-M fragment captures 0 of 1,000 random Mathlib declarations at the doc-gen4 signature layer (fragment_wilson_ub 0.0027 vs the 1% viability gate — even the upper confidence bound sits 3.7x under the floor), and the pinned 7B locator places only 5 of the kernel's 39 math-v0 concepts in Mathlib top-5 with F-verification (12.8%; UB 0.2408 vs the 80% gate; host-indexed). Machinery legs [MEASURED: same verdict]: the F∘B round-trip reaches its fixed point 33/33 through the production renderer+parser, and bridge-F verified 7/139 live LLM candidates (5.04% >= the 1% near-zero-kill floor) — so the forward map, renderer, parser, and verification harness all WORK; there is simply almost nothing in range for them to work ON. The pre-registered consequence binds verbatim: 'below either bound ⇒ Metamath-only identity stands, Lean stays annotation-only'. The bridge-programme kill (near-zero F) did NOT fire. Net for the correctness thesis: the Lean-minting / formal-reconstruction leg is DEAD AT CURRENT SCOPE — kernel size 39 math concepts, signature-layer extraction, this locator — with a pre-registered re-entry (the envelope's own bulk-authoring regression re-run at 10⁴–10⁵ kernel records, plus the ntp-toolkit definiens-layer route), not dead as a formalism claim. The reject-reason decomposition is what licenses that scoping and no more: 720/1000 first-failures are unmapped-constant (vocabulary — the kernel-size axis), 259/1000 are extraction-layer censoring (ASM-0035, pre-declared), and 21/1000 are visible grammar/parse residue including 9 typeclass-binder rejects — the measured tip of a formalism wall whose thickness behind the vocabulary wall is UNMEASURED.",
registry/assessments/g8.json:41:      "means_for_correctness_thesis": "Three separable findings. (1) THE MACHINERY IS SOUND — the honest positive. The deterministic spine HS8 needed — forward map F (signaturePretty -> canonical pm-ast/1 with de Bruijn canonicalisation, caps, sort-check, vacuous-binder rejection), the renderer B, and F-verification of live LLM output — executed end-to-end with 0 internal parser errors, a 33/33 round-trip fixed point, and 7 genuinely F-verified candidates from a live model. The Law-3 shape (neural proposer <-> formal language <-> deterministic verifier) is again mechanically functional at R0, consistent with l3a/a5 on the oracle side. Scope honesty: the round-trip was exercised over the 33 probe statements ONLY (zero sample mints existed), so 'sound' means sound-on-probes + live-verification-works, not sound-on-Mathlib-minted-content — none exists. (2) THE COVERAGE IS ~ZERO, AND THE FAIL IS ABOUT REACH, NOT CORRECTNESS. 0/1000 in-fragment restated on the layer-visible slice: even excluding the 259 layer-censored declarations and the 5 non-statement-bearing kinds, 0/736 visible statement-bearing declarations minted. The kernel's 39-record Peano-core math sector (naturals, order, divisibility, basic sets/pairs) simply does not contain the constants random Mathlib talks about — Mathlib is 315k+ declarations spanning algebra through analysis [design-lean-route §1, measured 2026-07-07], and 72% of the sample died at the first gate on exactly that (unmapped-constant). (3) THE LOCATION LEG SAYS THE CROSSWALK IS ALSO NOT FREE. Even for the 39 concepts the kernel DOES have, a 7B locator found F-verifiable Mathlib homes for only 5 (3/30 by genuine content verification, 2/9 by the weaker anchor table), with 60% of its candidate names not existing in Mathlib at all. The planned bridge-annotation layer (design-lean-route follow-up 2) cannot currently be populated by a small LLM + F-verification alone at any useful rate; whether a frontier-model locator changes this is unmeasured and cheap to test. What the FAIL does NOT touch: the Metamath identity route (math-mm), profile-M's internal correctness story (39 records, validator-checked, adequacy checkable relative to the pinned basis — design-math-sector §5's epistemic win survives WITHIN the kernel's own records), and the F-verification mechanism itself.",
registry/assessments/g8.json:42:      "kernel_size_vs_formalism_limit": "The tasked question: is 0/1000 a current-kernel-SIZE limitation or a deeper formalism limit? The measured decomposition supports SIZE-FIRST, FORMALISM-UNKNOWN-BEHIND-IT. For size: 720/1000 (72%) of rejects are unmapped-constant [MEASURED: results-log/g8.jsonl seq 0] — the failure class that bulk authoring directly attacks, and the frozen envelope itself names KERNEL SIZE as the relevant axis with a pre-registered re-check at 10⁴–10⁵ records. For the instrument share: 259/1000 (definiens-unavailable-at-layer 225 + no-signature-at-layer 34) are doc-gen4-layer censoring, pre-declared as a conservative-for-PASS / mildly-anti-conservative-for-this-FAIL-rule stipulation [STIPULATED: ASM-0035]; the ntp-toolkit route retires it for ~US$5–15 [design-lean-route §5, claimed]. For formalism: the VISIBLE residue is small (9 typeclass-binder + 5 signature-shape + 1 unsupported-token + 1 parse = 16/1000, plus 5 kind-not-statement-bearing) — but this is a FIRST-FAILURE histogram: a declaration rejected at unmapped-constant was never tested against the later gates, so the 720 upper-bounds the size-attributable share rather than establishing it, and profile-M's closed many-sorted-FOL grammar excludes typeclasses, dependent types, and universes BY DESIGN [design-math-sector §2.4, decision] while a large fraction of Mathlib is typeclass-structured. HONEST BOTTOM LINE: the data are fully consistent with 'the fragment widens as the kernel grows', and equally incapable of establishing it — behind the vocabulary wall there may be a thick formalism wall, and no measurement yet says which. That claim is registered as an EXTRAPOLATION (reported ASM-0039, load_bearing false, resolution path = the pre-registered bulk-authoring regression re-run of the g8 fragment gate + the ntp-toolkit definiens-layer re-run). NEVER a premise: no design may assume the fragment clears 1% at 10⁴–10⁵ records.",
registry/assessments/g8.json:43:      "kill_chain_read": "DECISION (enacted by the frozen kill text, not by discretion): NF3 resolves to the pre-registered fallback — Metamath-only identity stands; Lean stays annotation-only (lean-ref/1 records, no urn:concept: minting from Lean) [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/g8.json, kill_criterion_verbatim + fired_rule_index 1]. g8 therefore SCOPES the Lean-minting sub-claim rather than killing the formal-reconstruction programme: (a) the sub-claim 'profile-M can mint a viable fragment of Mathlib NOW' is DEAD at current scope — kernel math-v0's 39 concepts, doc-gen4 signature layer, this sample, this locator — and decisively so (even the Wilson UPPER bound is 3.7x under the viability floor; this is not a near-miss); (b) the bridge-PROGRAMME kill (near-zero F-verification) did NOT fire — F verified 7/139 live candidates, so the verification machinery is alive and the pre-registered re-entry paths stay open; (c) the fallback is BINDING NOW: until a successor re-run clears the gate, no design, prereg premise, or pitch may treat Lean/Mathlib as a mintable identity source — Lean content enters only as lean-ref/1 annotations, exactly as docs/design-lean-route.md §2 already concluded on identity-theoretic grounds. g8 converts that design argument into a measured quantity: the honest ingestion boundary design-lean-route drew is where the numbers actually land. Nothing upstream auto-resolves: HS2/HS3 (Π soundness, semantics pin), g9 (authoring), and the Metamath leg are untouched; downstream, any 'kernel reconstructs formal mathematics' paper claim now has exactly one citable measured status: NOT at current kernel size (0/1000, UB 0.0027), machinery sound (33/33, F-verification live).",
registry/assessments/g8.json:57:    "cross_experiment_picture": "g8 is a COVERAGE-BOUND NEGATIVE, and it lands exactly on the programme's most consistent measured pattern: the kernel's deterministic machinery keeps passing while the kernel's reach into wild content keeps measuring small. The series, all audited or verdicted under rails: m0b — token-mass coverage 0.3542 on the FRIENDLIEST natural-language corpus at molecules-v0, corpus/kernel-state-indexed [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/m0b.json]; compression-census — proposition-level ENGAGEMENT on that same corpus ~0.6%, two orders under token mass [registry/assessments/compression-census.json]; define-op-census — internal define-checkability 0.7710 on the SELF-AUTHORED minted substrate with the external-benchmark mapper leg untouched [registry/assessments/define-op-census.json]; l3a/a5 — engine exactness 100% raw, ON EVALS AUTHORED AGAINST THEIR OWN STORES [registry/assessments/oracle-coverage.json]; and now g8 — the sharpest point on the curve: against a fully wild, fully formal external corpus, fragment coverage is 0/1000 (UB 0.27%) at kernel size 39. The gradient is monotone and interpretable: coverage falls from ~1.0 (self-authored) through ~0.35 (friendliest NL corpus, token level) through ~0.006 (proposition engagement) to ~0.000 (random Mathlib, statement-mintability level). Inside the fortress everything is exact; the walls are real and they are close. g8 adds one genuinely new piece the NL-side experiments could not: in the formal sector the coverage boundary is ITEMISED — a named reject-reason histogram per declaration — so 'grow the kernel' has, for the first time, a measured, decomposable target (72% first-fail on vocabulary) instead of an undifferentiated mass. It also repeats the f2/a5-llm-family lesson from the other side: the LLM leg (location) failed mostly by hallucinating names (84/139 unresolvable), while the deterministic verifier correctly caught everything — the proposer is the weak seat, the verifier holds; that is Law 2/Law 3 behaving as designed even in a losing experiment.",
registry/assessments/g8.json:59:    "epistemic_promotions": [

Per programme law every positive below is MEASURED-UNAUDITED until the re-audit lands; the [MEASURED] tags in this record are to be read as MEASURED-UNAUDITED throughout, with the single exception of quantities the audit itself recomputed cross-vendor (endpoint values), which are noted where cited."
registry/assessments/a5-llm.json:36:    "kill_chain_read": "None of the three verbatim kills fired. (a) DIFFERENTIATOR-KILL: no extraction-gate-valid LLM cell within 0.05 of the engine — closest cell llm-rag-R3 conj 0.3398 vs engine 1.0, gap 0.6602 against a >=0.95 window [MEASURED, audit-recomputed]. (b) COST-KILL: cost_ratio_min 22835.9 > 10^3, computed against the CHEAPEST LLM cell (llm-direct-R1, $7.64e-6/query) vs engine $3.35e-10/query [MEASURED, audit-recomputed]. (c) margin branch: primary one-sided 95% UPPER bound 0.6827 > 0.10 — never close. The PASS conjunction fired (rule 2): primary LB 0.6346 > 0.10 AND cost_ratio_min > 1000 AND engine_matches_a5 = 1. Instrument gates: instrument_valid TRUE — extraction success 0.9867-1.0 across all six LLM cells (every cell passed its Wilson-LB>=0.90 gate), retrieval_completeness_violations 0, engine regression exact vs results-log/a5.jsonl plus byte-identical repeat. Separation gate FAILED as designed to be able to (llm-direct R3-R1 gap -0.1279 < 0.05), so scale_trend_rag left the Holm family as INSTRUMENT-INVALID before any p comparison. Remaining Holm family, all four passed: covered_superiority (p~1e-4), refusal_superiority (p~1e-4), rag_lift_r3 (p~1e-4), fabrication_material (p~1.7e-28).",
registry/assessments/a5-llm.json:38:      "[MEASURED, audit-recomputed endpoints; record MEASURED-UNAUDITED] HA5-LLM at exactly this scope: on the pinned 977-query kot-query-code/1 slice the deterministic kot-axiom engine scored conj 1.0 (855/855 covered-exact under STRICT a5 rules incl. provenance+license; 122/122 controls refused with the exact expected ERR codes) vs best gate-valid LLM cell llm-rag-R3 conj 0.3398 under everything-pro-LLM lenient scoring (ASM-0012); absolute effect +0.6602, one-sided 95% BCa LB +0.6346, 6.3x the 0.10 margin. The arXiv:2505.12118 motivation converts LIT-BACKED -> MEASURED on this slice at R1-R3.",
registry/assessments/a5-llm.json:39:      "[MEASURED] Efficiency co-gate (HL3a cost clause, first measurement): cost_ratio_min 22,835.9 — and that is the FLOOR, taken against the cheapest, nearly-useless cell (llm-direct-R1, conj 0.2651); against the best-accuracy cell (llm-rag-R3) the ratio is ~651,000. Engine 8.9 us/query CPU ($3.35e-10 at the pinned core rate) vs $7.6e-6..$2.2e-4/query GPU. Latency ratio floor 2,236. F0 MARGINAL-INFERENCE accounting only — see does_not_license item 5.",
registry/assessments/a5-llm.json:40:      "[MEASURED] H-FAB quantified: the best-LLM cell fabricated answers on 78.7% of the 122 control queries (96/122; Wilson LB > 0.30, p~1.7e-28) DESPITE being handed oracle-strong complete retrieval; llm-direct-R2 fabricated on 99.2%. The engine refused 122/122 with licensed ERR codes at zero fabrication. The fail-closed anti-hallucination surface is real, large, and now measured at these rungs.",
registry/assessments/a5-llm.json:41:      "[MEASURED] rag_lift_r3: handing the exact supporting records + rendered axioms lifts R3 conj 0.1372 -> 0.3398 (one-sided LB > 0). Facts-in-context help a 1.7B model materially — and still leave it 0.66 absolute below the engine on its own slice. The oracle-strong null (Law 2, strongest form) was beaten decisively, which is the one comparison this record class was licensed to make.",
registry/assessments/a5-llm.json:42:      "[MEASURED] Instrument discipline held end-to-end: all six extraction gates passed (no cell excluded from best-LLM selection), the engine leg reproduced the audited a5 record exactly (engine_matches_a5=1 + deterministic repeat), and the separation gate demonstrated it can actually fire — the design's fail-closed machinery did real work rather than decorating the record.",
registry/assessments/a5-llm.json:43:      "[MEASURED] Actual metered LLM spend ~$0.48 total (sum usd_per_query x 977 over six cells) vs dry-plan $3-8 and cap $25 — the dry-plan STIPULATION resolved safe-side."
registry/assessments/a5-llm.json:46:      "[DESIGN-BOUND — the substrate confound, GPT-5.6 G5, ENDORSED] The honest ceiling of this record: 'a deterministic engine over its own extracted, typed records beats a small closed-book-or-RAG LLM, by a wide margin and at >=10^4x lower marginal inference cost, on a self-authored oracle-favourable code slice whose queries are already formal.' The inputs are formal kot-query-code/1 objects — no NL, no parse step — and there is NO conventional-substrate arm (SQL/Datalog/AST-index over the same records, or LLM-emits-kot-query/1-engine-executes). Nothing in this evidence distinguishes the kot-axiom kernel machinery from ANY typed store plus deterministic checker; the content-vs-substrate question is open by construction. This PASS is a substrate comparison and must be narrated as one — not as a kernel-superiority result, not as a deployment differentiator. The deployment-shaped comparisons live in the pre-registered successors (l3a-parse for the NL/parse leg; the e9 structured-null arm for kernel-vs-any-schema).",
registry/assessments/a5-llm.json:49:      "[MEASURED-descriptive — truncation caveat, ASM-0013 qualified] 194/977 llm-rag prompts (19.9%) exceeded the 8192 context and were tail-truncated in every rag cell; the design expected 0. On those items the 'oracle-strong' null was under-delivered at the model's input even though pack-level retrieval completeness held (violations=0). Worst-case repair bound (deterministic re-analysis of logged counts; descriptive, not verdict-bearing): crediting ALL 194 truncated items to llm-rag-R3 as correct yields at most (332+194)/977 = 0.538 conj — still 0.412 outside the 0.05 differentiator-kill window and leaving the primary effect >= 0.462, 4.6x the margin. Neither the PASS nor the no-kill reading can be flipped by the truncation; what IS voided is any claim that the rag cells' absolute level is the ceiling of handed-facts performance at these rungs. a5-llm-frontier (long-context) removes this properly.",
registry/assessments/a5-llm.json:50:      "[DESIGN-BOUND — cost-ledger caveat, GPT-5.6 G5(iii), ENDORSED for narration] The 22,836x is MARGINAL INFERENCE cost under the frozen F0 3.3/3.4 accounting. It excludes the amortized costs of world-extraction, record authoring, axiom authoring, prompt-pack construction and indexing on both sides. An all-in total-cost-of-ownership ledger is UNMEASURED and would change the ratio by an unquantified amount in an unquantified direction (the engine side carries the authoring amortization; the LLM side carries pack/serving amortization). Do not quote 22,836x as TCO; successors adopt explicit all-in ledger lines.",

registry/assessments/oracle-coverage.json:32:    "headline": "The deterministic-grounding-and-checking half of the correctness case now rests on three audited MEASURED facts, all at R0 (no host model). (1) m0b [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/m0b.json, audit CONFIRMED]: the kernel vocabulary reaches 0.3542 of the pinned TinyStories task-family content-word mass at the molecules-v0 rung (kernel-v0 0.2210, wn31-aligned band 0.7841) — above the pre-declared 0.20 NICHE-SCOPE gate, so the niche banner does NOT bind, on ONE corpus and ONE incomplete kernel instance. (2) l3a [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/l3a.json, audit CONFIRMED]: the kot-axiom/1 v0 rules engine on gold-parsed closed-grammar queries is exact and fail-closed — covered-exact Wilson-LB 0.9955 (raw 600/600 with provenance + non-empty axiom license), strict correct-refusal-code Wilson-LB 0.9911 (raw 300/300), all 6 planted store violations surfaced, ~5.3 us/query on shared CPU. (3) a5 [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/a5.json, audit CONFIRMED]: the BYTE-IDENTICAL engine, extended only by data and a pure desugaring layer over a deterministically-extracted code world layer, repeats the pattern — covered-exact Wilson-LB 0.9968 (raw 855/855), strict refusal Wilson-LB 0.9783 (raw 122/122), all 3 planted violations surfaced, ~7.8 us/query. Together: the Law-3 deterministic seat (formal language + engine that owns correctness) EXISTS, is sound on its covered slices, fails closed off them, costs microseconds, and ports across a domain vertical without touching the engine. What none of this contains: a model, natural language, a non-trivial baseline, or any real-world fact/corpus coverage. These are instrument-adequacy and perimeter facts; the claim that this grounding helps any LLM remains entirely unmeasured (the programme's own bottom line stands: zero audited end-task wins over the kernel-as-text null).",
registry/assessments/oracle-coverage.json:77:    "epistemic_promotions": [
registry/assessments/f-efficiency.json:45:        "[MEASURED, AUDITED] KOTK/2 entropy-columnar packs the full committed lexical-wn31 corpus (117,791 records) at 2.8987 B/record vs 19.528 B/record for the zstd-19 glosses-only text store of the SAME records, as served: byte_ratio 6.7369 (registry/verdicts/f1.json; audit CONFIRMED, registry/audits/f1/1-gate-a-codex.json). The packer self-verifies losslessness (encode -> decode -> re-mint all URNs, exit 1 on mismatch), so the ratio is between a PROVEN-lossless structured form and general-purpose-compressed text.",
registry/assessments/f-efficiency.json:46:        "[MEASURED, AUDITED] The secondary confirms the 2.90 B/rec prior exactly (2.8987 measured vs the 2.90 B/rec KOTK/2 decision-record prior, docs/design-compact-kernel-serialization-v2.md) — the pack format behaves on the frozen instrument as it did in the design study.",
registry/assessments/f-efficiency.json:47:        "[MEASURED, comparator-robustness note] Against the MORE CONSERVATIVE committed text form — zstd-19 identity-JCS structured text at 9.58 B/rec (measured in the KOTK/2 decision record, not in this verdict) — the ratio is ~3.3x, still clearing the 2.0 bar. The PASS is robust to the choice between the two committed text comparators; the frozen, pre-registered comparator was glosses-only text (the kernel-as-text null in storage form, Law 2), and 6.74x is the verdict number.",
registry/assessments/f-efficiency.json:48:        "[MEASURED] Law-2 discipline was honoured in storage form: the comparator is the kernel's OWN content rendered as compressed text, not a strawman. Beating it in bytes keeps the M4 story eligible to proceed to its accuracy leg (F5) rather than reducing to 'curated definitions compressed well'."
registry/assessments/f-efficiency.json:55:        "[DESIGN-BOUND] No accuracy, no model, no task anywhere in f1 — it cannot SUPPORT the efficiency thesis, only trim or retain a premise (the design's own cheapest-decisive framing, SS6: 'F1 ... cannot support the thesis, only trim it'). The information-content asymmetry between the pack (symbolic axiom graph) and the gloss text (NL definitions) also means byte parity across representations is approximate by nature; what matters downstream is accuracy at matched bytes, which is F5's endpoint, unrun.",
registry/assessments/f-efficiency.json:63:        "[MEASURED-UNAUDITED] The FAIL itself: the frozen HE1 (R1,R2) gap-closure primary fired its kill (gap_closed_fraction_R1R2 = -40.13, CI [-135.6,-23.1]; 87 eligible final runs, none excluded; instrument gate valid). This is a real, first-class negative result of the frozen design and is recorded at equal prominence with every positive in this batch.",
registry/assessments/f-efficiency.json:64:        "[MEASURED-UNAUDITED] The scale premise fails on this slice: R2-alone <= R1-alone on D-QA (0.388 vs 0.394, descriptive post-mortem cells). 360M is not better than 135M on this task family — a substantive finding about the D-QA slice/SmolLM2 pairing that any future (s,S) design on this family must gate on, and the concrete reason the estimand degenerated.",
registry/assessments/f-efficiency.json:65:        "[MEASURED-UNAUDITED] HE2 / M5 cascade-dominance is DEAD at this scope: the verifier-gated 135M->1.7B cascade was not strictly dominant over both the logprob-gated and the gloss-text self-check-gated cascades at every pre-registered escalation budget (Holm p 0.0471 at the worst budget => family fail). The model's own free calibration signal was not beaten under the pre-registered dominance standard. f2b-replicate explicitly does NOT re-litigate this; it stands as the efficiency track's clearest un-contaminated negative.",
registry/assessments/f-efficiency.json:66:        "[MEASURED-UNAUDITED, leakage-caveated] The pre-registered secondaries that passed, within scope: kernel verifier beats gloss-text self-verify+retry (p ~1e-4), beats the kernel-as-text null (p ~1e-4), beats the trained PRM at matched FLOPs (p ~1e-4, HC3 kill not fired), gap_closed(R2,R3) = 2.73 (p ~1e-4, the second frozen rung pair, where a real gap existed), seed-sign gate consistent (boolean true = >=4/5 seeds same-direction per the frozen test), cost_ratio_vs_S = 0.4327 < 1. These carry BOTH banners verbatim: (i) MEASURED-UNAUDITED (audit state N/A — negatives are not audit-gated), and (ii) the flagged oracle-leakage caveat — on D-QA the verifier's accept test is string-equality to the same canonical record that DEFINED the gold answer, so the measured lift is inflated by the eval's construction. Their properly-landed, audited successor is f2b-replicate's envelope-scoped PASS (+0.1507 absolute, LB +0.1053, shuffled-derangement control recovering ~0), which this record adopts by reference and does not restate beyond that.",
registry/assessments/f-efficiency.json:67:        "[MEASURED-UNAUDITED] Efficiency cost datum at this scope: cost_ratio_vs_S = 0.4327 (F0 ledger) — the verify-retry arm ran below half the per-query cost of model_S while the estimand around it degenerated. Consistent in direction with f2b-replicate's audited cost_ratio_vs_R3 = 0.103; neither number extends beyond its eval design."

registry/assessments/g-series.json:39:    "headline": "The G-series has produced exactly TWO mechanical results, and both are FORMALISM-CAPACITY facts, not semantics-soundness facts. g7 [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/g7.json] decisively resolves the apply-clause fork: one-level inline-only rendering breaches the 32-clause cap or 1.5x clause growth on 91.34% of 117,899 committed bulk records (bound: 10%), so kot-ast/2 apply-clauses are selected — a productive design selection, explicitly not a programme kill. g6 [MEASURED: registry/verdicts/g6.json] is INCONCLUSIVE by rule: AND-under-operator demand is rare on the committed axiom universe (142/280,910 = 0.0505%, vs the 20% bound) but only 2 of those 142 axioms are expressible in the closed kot-axiom/1 sidecar inventory, so the '∃-conjunctive-only native fragment suffices' hypothesis is neither confirmed nor killed — the grammar-capacity fork stays OPEN. Everything the correctness thesis actually stands on — Π read-out soundness (g2), the semantics pin (g3), authoring viability (g4/g9), Lean minting (g8) — is UNMEASURED: those experiments are frozen-but-unrun or DRAFT, blocked on input materials (human gold judgments, instance descriptions, a Mathlib crawl, an authored explication set), not on compute or design. The honest G-family bottom line: the native formalism's container shape is being settled cheaply and decisively; whether the semantics INSIDE the container are sound has not yet been measured at all.",
registry/assessments/g-series.json:70:    "epistemic_promotions": [
registry/assessments/define-op-census.json:31:      "where_0p7710_sits": "[MEASURED, in scope] 0.7710 is a SELF-AUTHORED-END number: it counts define-checkability of the kernel's OWN minted onto-obo definitional records. On the two fully-ingested self-authored shards it IS the ~1.0 regime (GO 1.0, SO 1.0); the aggregate 0.7710 is dragged below 1.0 ONLY by MONDO's un-ingested cross-ontology filler references — a data-ingestion gap, not a difficulty signal from the external world. So 0.7710 belongs at the self-authored (easiest) end of the gradient, NOT at any point further down it.",
registry/assessments/define-op-census.json:32:      "why_it_bounds_nothing_downstream": "[MEASURED discipline] The gradient is monotone-decreasing because each step to the right adds a HARDER, less-controlled leg: self-authored records (legs 1-2 satisfiable by construction) -> friendly external NL vocabulary (m0b, still just surface-form membership) -> real propositions engaged by the roll-up machinery (~0.6%, engagement not correctness) -> a hostile external formal corpus (Mathlib ~0). The measured 2-3-orders-of-magnitude drop from self-authored to every external point IS the empirical form of the three-legs discipline: the fall happens at the binding third leg (external item -> closed grammar). An internal-substrate completeness number therefore cannot upper-bound any external-corpus point; it can only say 'the substrate the external leg would draw on is mature'.",
registry/assessments/define-op-census.json:38:      "what_0p7710_contributes": "[MEASURED, in scope] 0.7710 establishes that the INTERNAL substrate for this new predicate class is 77% live (GO/SO complete), so the define-lane is functional end-to-end on ingested records and READY to be pointed at a b-cov external census. It expands the POTENTIAL breadth surface (a new op with a mature internal substrate) — this is the records-only value coverage-growth-ingestion-plan.md SS1 says ingestion delivers immediately, now MEASURED rather than asserted.",
registry/assessments/define-op-census.json:43:      "[MEASURED] Axis-A substrate maturity: post-8es the genus-differentia DEFINE op — the plan's named 'cheapest kappa_B lever' — resolves 77.10% of the minted onto-obo definitional substrate into engine status=answer, WITH GO AND SO COMPLETE (1.0 each). For the linter's Axis-A consumer (proposition-level coverage: each clean definitional record moves a proposition from lattice class U toward G+/G- on its covered domain, coverage-growth-ingestion-plan.md SS1), the substrate is 77% live and the define-op lane is functional end-to-end on ingested records.",
registry/assessments/define-op-census.json:44:      "[MEASURED] The residual is a DATA/ownership gap with NAMED mechanical routes, not an engine defect: at 0.7710 all 3,941 MONDO misses are un-ingested foreign fillers (HP/CHEBI/NCBITaxon); at 0.8032 the residual 3,387 is mechanically resolved into HGNC genes (non-OBO, bespoke extractor), HP (licence-held), CHR bands (ownership), and a small clean-licence OBO tail. GO byte-unchanged + SO fully unlocked confirms the engine + alias table are complete where their referents are already ingested.",
registry/assessments/define-op-census.json:45:      "[MEASURED] 8es was the decisive lever: define-checkability moved 0.5478 -> 0.7710 from the relation-resolution change alone, with SO 0.0822 -> 1.0 and MONDO 0.0134 -> 0.4871. A clean instrument-improvement datum: the pre-8es number under-measured the substrate because of a shorthand-alias gap, not a coverage ceiling.",
registry/assessments/define-op-census.json:46:      "[MEASURED, breadth-substrate] The define-op adds a new checkable predicate class whose internal substrate is 77% live; this makes the define-lane READY for a b-cov external kappa_B census. It converts 'is the define-op lane functional on our records?' from open to MEASURED-yes (0.77, GO/SO complete).",
registry/assessments/compression-census.json:43:      "[MEASURED] B-E0 engagement/savings: on TinyStories-valid (94e43181..., 21,990 stories), the kernel-v0+molecules-v0 roll-up instrument engages 0.592-0.643% of expanded word mass and yields 0.399-0.444% net token savings — decisively (~4.5-5x) below the K-B0 2% sanity floor. WITHIN THIS SCOPE (this corpus, this kernel instance, this fail-closed v0 parser) roll-up compression is not worth its complexity: idea-B is PARKED per the K-B0 kill's own text ('idea parks behind coverage growth (idea A) and/or the OR extension, with the census as the re-entry gate').",
registry/assessments/compression-census.json:44:      "[MEASURED] The binding constraint is VOCABULARY COVERAGE, not the roll-up grammar or parse permissiveness: the dominant abstain cause is unmapped-word = 2,068,450 (a1-hybrid/strict), an order of magnitude above the next causes (pronoun-anaphor 461,962; open-class-verb 287,439). Engagement is bounded by what the mapper/kernel can name, i.e. the SAME m0b-coverage lever (0.3542 @ molecules-v0). This is why the outcome is a PARK behind coverage growth and not a mechanism defect.",
registry/assessments/compression-census.json:45:      "[MEASURED] Caveat 1 (single favourable corpus) does NOT rescue: TinyStories-valid is the deliberately favourable ~1.5k-lemma m0b continuity domain, i.e. the BEST-case corpus for a coverage-bounded engagement number. The park rests on the measured favourable-corpus savings (~0.4%) alone, which is already ~5x below the floor; it does not depend on any other corpus.",
registry/assessments/compression-census.json:46:      "[MEASURED] Caveat 2 (conservative v0 instrument) does NOT rescue: the measured permissiveness delta is tiny and off-target. Relaxing strict->permissive-det moves savings only 0.399%->0.439% (~+10% relative; 0.592%->0.636% engagement), and that relaxation is a FLAGGED LOSSY determiner convention (the/that/those -> THIS) ineligible for a lossless-roll-up claim. A ~5x gap cannot be closed by a lever whose measured reach is ~10% and whose target (parse conventions) is not the binding constraint (unmapped-word vocabulary). Permissiveness passes act on parse conventions; the gap lives in vocabulary.",
registry/assessments/compression-census.json:47:      "[MEASURED] B-RT machinery is sound: 100% pass (1,786 items checked, 0 failures) across the depth x clause-count grid (encoder content-hash 40e8c8ba...). Parse -> roll-up -> URN -> expand -> re-parse is an exact identity on the covered fragment, and D=8192 vectors are byte-identical across the round trip. The PARK is about corpus ENGAGEMENT, not correctness of the roll-up/expansion path — nothing is broken.",
registry/assessments/compression-census.json:48:      "[MEASURED] OR grammar-extension decision number (a clean secondary deliverable): OR-forfeit is clause 0 / 0.0000% and NP 83-90 / ~0.0045-0.0050% of mass. The missing disjunction operator forfeits essentially nothing. Per design SS3.1 ('the decision is a number, not a taste'), this resolves AGAINST adding OR at v0 — an ALGORITHM_VERSION bump + X0 regen + Phase-X re-run is not licensed by <0.005% of forfeited mass.",
registry/assessments/compression-census.json:49:      "[MEASURED] Dedupe / global-dictionary sizing: 911-1,145 unique URNs at dedupe ratios 6.6-8.0 (occurrences/unique). The invented-concept dictionary is small at this coverage; the promotion-to-named-concept opportunity (a coverage feedback into idea A) is real but tiny in absolute terms at the current instance.",
registry/assessments/compression-census.json:59:      "[DESIGN-BOUND / BOUNDARY-STOP] Host-BPE token savings are UNMEASURED: no pinned host tokenizer on box, so B-E0 spans are word-token and character denominated, not host-BPE. The 0.4% is a word-mass number; the design SS1.5 accounting identity needs the pinned tokenizer for the true prefill-token savings. The floor comparison is done in word-mass as a proxy; the direction (~5x below) is robust to the currency but the exact multiple is tokenizer-dependent."

registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json:27:    "kill_chain_read": "None of the three verbatim kills fired. (a) primary: PASSED, effect_size = +0.1507 with one-sided 95% BCa lower bound +0.1053 >= 0 [MEASURED]. (b) shuffled recovery: point estimate -0.0206, far below the 0.30 point-estimate kill trigger; the Holm secondary also passed (ub95 = 0.1076 < 0.30) [MEASURED]. (c) commodity-verification: competitor_closes_asmuch = false — gloss self-verify+retry 0.4893 and Skywork PRM-1.5B 0.5267 vs kernel-verify 0.7507 at <= matched FLOPs/query (F0 ledger) [MEASURED]. The TOST/NULL branch was never reached (tost_equivalence_pass = false). Separation instrument valid (R3-R1 gap 0.108, one-sided LB 0.072 > 0); extraction instrument 500 labelled / 0 failures; both ratio secondaries therefore read and both passed. Seed sign 3/3 (reported-only). The verdict rule that fired is the full PASS conjunction: primary AND beats_gloss AND beats_text_null AND shuffled_low_recovery.",
registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json:29:      "[MEASURED] HE1 (fresh-item replication, absolute non-inferiority): on 250 fresh, LC8-leak-checked, kernel-covered d-qa-r items x 3 seeds, SmolLM2-135M + kernel-verify-retry (fixed pre-registered k=4) reached acc 0.7507 vs SmolLM2-1.7B-alone 0.6000 — absolute effect +0.1507 (one-sided 95% BCa LB +0.1053). The F2-family verifier lift is real on fresh items in the denominator-free form; the F2 primary's death is now attributable to its degenerate gap denominator, not to the absence of a lift, WITHIN THIS SCOPE.",
registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json:30:      "[MEASURED] H-STRUCT (the load-bearing new result): a seed-pinned DERANGEMENT of the record->concept map at identical retry topology and identical cost (shuffled arm acc 0.4867 vs R1-alone 0.4920) recovered -2.1% (point) of the true-verify lift, ub95 +10.8% < 30%. The lift requires the CORRECT record<->item alignment: it is kernel-CONTENT-specific, not retry-against-any-oracle STRUCTURE. The structure-artifact explanation of F2's 272-up/0-down flip profile is dead at this scope.",
registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json:31:      "[MEASURED] RT-2 + Law-2 at this scope: the kernel arm beats gloss-text self-verify+retry at matched budget (0.4893) and the passive kernel-as-text null (0.4920, indistinguishable from R1-alone). Passive kernel prose confers no lift here; the benefit requires the machine-checkable verify-retry mechanism.",
registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json:32:      "[MEASURED] HC3, indexed to this PRM size class only: the kernel verifier beats the trained Skywork-o1-Open-PRM-Qwen-2.5-1.5B (pinned revision) at matched FLOPs (PRM arm 0.5267). The commodity-verification kill did not fire at the 1.5B class.",
registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json:33:      "[MEASURED] Ratio secondaries (separation gate valid): gap_closed(R1,R3) = 2.40 with one-sided LB 1.76 > 1.0 — the 135M+verifier system does not merely close the R1->R3 gap on this slice, it overshoots it.",
registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json:34:      "[MEASURED] Efficiency datum (F0 ledger, this eval design): cost_ratio_vs_R3 = 0.103 — the winning 135M+verifier arm ran at ~10% of the 1.7B-alone per-query cost while beating it by 15.1 points absolute. Supports the efficiency thesis at exactly this scope.",
registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json:35:      "[MEASURED] Verdict standing: audit-confirmed PASS (cross-vendor Codex/GPT-5.5 GATE-A recompute, all 12 checks ok). Per the engine's PASS defaults (research-engine.md SS2.2) the verifier-offload candidate is PROMOTED for exactly this claim scope, and the gated f2b-TRANSFER experiment is UNLOCKED — this replicate was its gate."
registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json:43:      "[DESIGN-BOUND] NOT a transfer result: the d-ext external slice was DESCRIPTIVE ONLY — all 500 d-ext items have kernel_checkable = false by construction, so that arm measured off-coverage abstention behaviour, not transfer. Nothing in this PASS says the lift survives items not authored against the kernel; that is f2b-TRANSFER.",
registry/assessments/f2b-replicate.json:44:      "[DESIGN-BOUND] Content-specificity is not ground-truth independence — the sharpest residual confound: H-STRUCT separates CONTENT from STRUCTURE, not real semantics from definitional circularity. The verifier accepts iff the answer string-equals the canonical record, and d-qa-r gold is still DEFINED by that same equality (templates and the 108 covered concepts are shared with d-qa by construction; freshness lives in distractors, donor claims, segments, option orders). Under BOTH the real-content reading AND the self-consistent-circularity reading, a derangement destroys the lift — so the shuffled control cannot adjudicate between them. Only externally-authored kernel-covered items (f2b-TRANSFER / RT-7a) can. This is why the envelope says 'oracle-favourable eval design' and why f2b-TRANSFER is the foreground next question, not an optional extension.",

registry/ideas.jsonl:52:{"schema": "kot-idea/1", "id": "idea-kernel-precision-linter", "title": "Kernel as a grounding/precision guardrail + controlled-language LINTER for LLM output (maintainer-proposed; Fable design complete 2026-07-09, awaiting maintainer sign-off)", "idea": "Use the kernel as, or as part of, a framework that guardrails / 'lints' LLM outputs to follow a very precise linguistic style — producing clear, concise, precisely-articulated written language with no meaningless or hallucinated text — by grounding every proposition in the kernel's controlled, NSM-grounded vocabulary and flagging/quarantining/rewriting what cannot be grounded.", "slots": [{"architecture": "framework", "part": "output-guardrail", "role": "lint"}, {"architecture": "framework", "part": "controlled-language-rewrite", "role": "rewrite"}, {"architecture": "seam", "part": "verifier", "role": "add"}], "mechanism": "DESIGNED (docs/next/kernel-precision-linter.md, node N-PL). Pipeline: segment -> map+extract (mapper a1-hybrid + proposition extractor into kot-ast/1 fragments; EXTRACTION IS THE INSTRUMENT, P10 extraction-failure gate applies) -> classify each proposition into a five-class verdict lattice {G+ grounded-consistent, G- grounded-contradicted (analytic/axiom/record contradiction — the only class the kernel may call WRONG), U ungrounded/coverage-gap (informational by default, NEVER rendered as false), V vacuous (rhetorical filler / post-explication tautology — the 'meaningless text' target, distinct from U), A ambiguous (mapper abstention)} via kernel_checkable + decode-verify + kot-axiom sidecar + world layer (the L3a engine in its third seat: answerer/checker/linter) -> act per declared mode {P permissive flag report; S strict contract: output must be kernel-parseable controlled surface with ungroundable content only inside explicit unverified-quarantine blocks — fail-closed, hallucination-surface reduction STRUCTURAL not detective (the CNL/ACE move); R rewrite: deterministic record->text re-render with mechanical round-trip gate (re-parse recovers identical proposition set)} -> deterministic versioned lint report (same text + same kernel version => byte-identical report). Severity = f(class, mode), never f(groundability) alone — this is the over-flagging defence at low coverage.
